name: Ivanti Neurons Platform
summary: Umbrella platform experience connecting service management, endpoint operations, automation, and digital experience.

name: Ivanti Neurons for ITSM
summary: Service management foundation including business objects, forms, workflows, approvals, notifications, and automation.

name: Incident Management
summary: Operational handling of incidents, assignment, communication, lifecycle movement, and reporting.

name: Problem Management
summary: Root cause analysis, recurring issue handling, trend review, and knowledge feedback loops.

name: Change Management
summary: Change workflows, approvals, governance, and controlled deployment processes.

name: Service Request Management
summary: Catalog and request-based fulfillment design using approval logic, tasks, and status transitions.

name: Knowledge Management
summary: Knowledge article lifecycle, reuse, ownership, and support efficiency enablement.

name: Reporting and Dashboards
summary: Operational reporting, dashboard construction, trend visibility, and saved-search-powered insights.

name: Ivanti Neurons for UEM
summary: Unified endpoint management for governance, deployment, compliance, and operational visibility.

name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager
summary: Device operations, software delivery, patching support, targeting, and enterprise endpoint administration.

name: Patch Management
summary: Patch deployment, ring-based rollout, health tracking, and remediation operations.

name: Software Distribution
summary: Package rollout, targeting, job scheduling, and deployment outcome validation.

name: Discovery and Inventory
summary: Device discovery, inventory visibility, reconciliation, and source-of-truth improvement.

name: IT Asset Management
summary: Tracks asset lifecycle, ownership, refresh, entitlement visibility, and reconciliation quality.

name: Ivanti Neurons for MDM
summary: Mobile device management for enrollment, ownership, compliance, app distribution, and security controls.

name: Mobile App Distribution
summary: Delivery of approved applications to managed devices with ownership and compliance considerations.

name: Compliance and Policy
summary: Policy enforcement, non-compliance actions, and governance-driven device control.

name: Ivanti Velocity
summary: Browser-based and scanning-first user experience improvement for warehouse and frontline operations.

name: Digital Experience
summary: Focuses on experience visibility, user-impact monitoring, and operational improvement across the estate.

name: Automation and Orchestration
summary: Scheduled operations, triggered automation, reusable action design, and orchestration patterns.

name: Integrations and APIs
summary: Cross-system connectivity, payload mapping, retries, authentication, and service orchestration.

name: Security, Roles, and Access
summary: Permission model, operational access, role-based governance, and data visibility considerations.
